title: Circle
description: Circle: A plane curve. Standard circle defining a curve of constant distance from a point, its Centre.

Centre.description: Origin point defining location of the Circle in three-dimensional space. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

Normal.description: Vector perpendicular to the plane in which the Circle lies. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Radius.description: Distance from the Centre to any point on Circle. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
